upstream.checkpoint_revision: set at download time in registry.json

model_properties.resolution_notes: upstream model card target is 640x640; MicroSeg supports variable image sizes

citations.title: SegFormer: Simple and Efficient Design for Semantic Segmentation with Transformers

license_notes: See upstream Hugging Face model card for exact license and usage constraints.
remarks: Classifier head is reinitialized for 2-label binary segmentation in MicroSeg.
Largest SegFormer variant used here; high memory/compute demand.
Checksum validation should be enabled before training.
